places.name: Cat House
places.description: This house's itty bitty size means no humans allowed.

places.name: Central Market of Valencia
places.description: This amazing example of Valencian Art Nouveau looks more like a cathedral than a public market.

places.name: Parque Gulliver
places.description: This massive fiberglass Gulliver turns every visitor into a Lilliputian.

places.name: Holy Chalice of Valencia
places.description: Of the many chalices in the running for the Holy Grail, this one in Valencia Cathedral sure looks the part.

places.name: El Carme Street Art
places.description: Vibrant street art created with mixed media.

places.name: La Mascletá
places.description: A daily pyrotechnic celebration marks a beloved tradition during Valencia's festival season.

places.name: L'Almoina Archaeological Centre
places.description: Walk into an underground archeological dig, the site of the Roman Forum that was once the center of Valencia.

places.name: Café Sant Jaume
places.description: Former 19th-century apothecary serves a top-tier version of Valencia's signature cocktail.
